subject: A Review of Set Theory
question: Determine whether each of the following statements is true or false. (a) $x \in \{x\}$ (b) $\{x\} \subseteq \{x\}$ (c) $\{x\} \in \{x\}$ (d) $\{x\} \in \{\{x\}\}$ (e) $\emptyset \subseteq \{x\}$ (f) $\emptyset \in \{x\}$
explanation: (a) True (b) True (c) False since $\{x\}$ is a set consisting of a single element $x$ and so $\{x\}$ is not a member of this set (d) True (e) True (f) False since $\{x\}$ does not have $\emptyset$ as a listed member Now, the collection of all subsets of a set A is of importance. We denote this set by $\mathcal{P}(A)$ and we call it the power set of A.
